Title: 0xea
Name: Xea
Christie
Xander
About: {p}Hyia~!,{Ep}{p}I am the main developer behind AnodyneWiki.{Ep}{p}I have a morbid fascination with {roa 'intravenous'} substance-use and will mainline any compound I can get my hands on.{Ep}{p}I spend a year moderating PsychonautWiki before my contributions got anonymized (merged into User:Blackhole; for {a 'assets/end_pw.png' 'calling out'} the abusive and inproper conduct coming from several moderators and the admin).{Ep}{p}Feel free to chat me up! <3{Ep}

Attributes: frequent {wkp 'intrusive thought' 'intrusive thoughts'} (taunting, sexual, anxiety, self-disgust, self-harm, suicidal)
prior phases of intense fear of {wkp 'abandonment (emotional)' 'abandonment'} (mitigated via long-term {class 'stimulant'} and {class 'opioid'} use)
reoccuring {xeff 'mania' 'manic'} episodes (24 hours to 1 month; {xeff 'appetite suppression'}, {wkp 'delusions of grandeur'})
{roa 'intravenous' 'Intravenous'} {class 'stimulant' 'stimulant'} {wkp 'addiction'} (since februrary 2024; periods of {xeff 'wakefulness'} up to 6+ days; longest peroid of abstinence 60 days)
{wkp 'self-destructive behaviour'} (self-punshing, head-banging, cutting, injecting, overdose) and reaccuring {xeff 'suicidal ideation'} (since ~2018)

prior {xeff 'delusion' 'delusions'} (paranoid, persecutory, {wkp 'delusions of reference'}, {wkp 'somatic symptom disorder' 'somatic'}, {wkp 'thought broadcasting'}, {wkp 'somantic delusion' 'hypochondriasis'}, {wkp 'delusions of grandeur'}, {wkp 'fregoli delusion'}, {wkp 'intermetamorphosis'}, {wkp 'mirrored-self misidentification'}, {wkp 'Cotard%27s syndrome' 'cotards syndrome'})

Effects: longer duration especially of amphetamines adrenic effects
Synergy.Note: bicarbonate raising urinary pH decreases amphetamine excretion

TriedSubstances.Name: 2,5-Dimethoxy-4-bromophenethylamine
Notes: "this felt like ages, felt very peaceful not having to think about a <next dose> but just being in a state of wonder which stains itself as long as I want"

TriedSubstances.Name: 2,5-Dimethoxy-4-chloro-N-(2-methoxybenzyl)phenethylamine
Notes: vaporized by soaking 2.4mg of blotters in 10ml 3/1 PG/VG (experience underwhelming requiring subligual dose to push me over the edge)
"this is a weirdly psychotic experience and I absoluely love it X333"
"I vividly recall accidentally drawing a spider and preceding to get horrified of it "
"if god is real than god is this"

TriedSubstances.Name: 2,5-Dimethoxy-4-iodo-N-(2-methoxybenzyl)phenethylamine
Notes: "dear god!, such sights! serotonin receptors huh?~"

TriedSubstances.Name: Amphetamine
Adverse: {sev 'strong'} {wkp 'addiction'} (+44g consumed; compulsive drug seeking on the street)
{xeff 'peripheral information misinterpretation'} (being observed through window; sudden movements)
{xeff 'auditory hallucination'} (loud breathing noise forcing me to keep my eyes open; 3+ {xeff 'autonomous-voice-communication' 'voices'} drowning out thoughts till {wkp 'unconsciousness'})
{wkp 'bells palsy' 'face dropping'} and {sev 'moderate'} numbing of sensations on the right side of my body

TriedSubstances.Name: Methamphetamine
Adverse: {sev 'strong'} {wkp 'addiction'} (+10g consumed; compulsive drug seeking on the street; psychological breakdown; intense mental dulling and tolerance)
{xeff 'time-distortion?s=time-compression' 'time compression'} (perception of music and other human beings comically speed up)
{xeff 'autonomous entity'} (hallucination of a man sitting in a chair next to me taunting me; pieces of dust manifesting as hallucinations of spider like creatures)
{xeff 'auditory hallucination'} (phantom music playing as if I were wearing headphones)

{xeff 'autonomous voice communication'} (voices of my mother and father screaming at each other for hours about my drug habit; mocking and laughter; police officer screaming in stair-way all night; police radio chatter blaring through the street spelling my name; hallucinations of my partner making fun of me to her friends and threatening to seriously hurt me)

TriedSubstances.Name: Dextromethamphetamine
Adverse: {sev 'strong'} {wkp 'addiction'} (+10g consumed; compulsive drug seeking on the street; psychological breakdown; intense mental dulling and tolerance)
{xeff 'time-distortion?s=time-compression' 'time compression'} (perception of music and other human beings comically speed up)
{xeff 'autonomous entity'} (hallucination of a man sitting in a chair next to me taunting me; pieces of dust manifesting as hallucinations of spider like creatures)
{xeff 'auditory hallucination'} (phantom music playing as if I were wearing headphones)

{xeff 'autonomous voice communication'} (voices of my mother and father screaming at each other for hours about my drug habit; mocking and laughter; police officer screaming in stair-way all night; police radio chatter blaring through the street spelling my name; hallucinations of my partner making fun of me to her friends and threatening to seriously hurt me)

TriedSubstances.Name: 3-Fluoroethamphetamine
Notes: barely active even when intravenously administered

TriedSubstances.Name: 4-Fluoromethamphetamine
Notes: barely active even when intravenously administered

TriedSubstances.Name: 3,4-Methylenedioxymethamphetamine
Adverse: {xeff 'suicidal ideation'} ("I just want to fucking die!")
Notes: allowed me to reprocess some traumatic events

TriedSubstances.Name: Orthophedrone
Adverse: {xeff 'perspective hallucination'} (shift in perception as if looking at everything through a different perspective and setting)
{sev 'intense'} distress and fear of being alone, the darkness and being damaged
{xeff 'delusion'} (of being poisoned by the friends taking care of me when suddenly a day after psychosis onset {xeff 'drifting'} effects kicked in)
immensely distressed by the ~100 syringes in my bed

TriedSubstances.Name: Metaphedrone
Effects: {sev 'intense'} {wkp 'addiction'} (made me feel as if this feeling would be the purpose of the rest of my life; +60g consumed; emptied out savings)

TriedSubstances.Name: N-Ethyl-nor-pentedrone
Adverse: {xeff 'time-distortion?s=time-compression' 'time compression'} (perception of music and other human beings comically speed up)
TriedSubstances.Notes: quite tweaky; IV'ing it *feels* like being *trampeled* on the *floor* by your {sub 'dopamine'}

TriedSubstances.Name: 5-Dihydrobenzofuranpyrovalerone
Notes: smell of cellar or old closet

TriedSubstances.Name: α-Pyrrolidinopentiophenone

TriedSubstances.Name: 3,4-Methylenedioxy-α-pyrrolidinoisohexanophenone

TriedSubstances.Name: Methylphenidate

TriedSubstances.Name: Ethylphenidate
TriedSubstances.Notes: passed out on it on both occasions

TriedSubstances.Name: Dimethocaine
Effects: {sev 'strong'} numbing effect both in veins and mouth

TriedSubstances.Name: Cocaine
TriedSubstances.Notes: occasional comfortable full body feeling; vaporized {sev 'strong'} fishy smell and numbness inside mouth

TriedSubstances.Name: Dimethyltryptamine
Notes: ~15mg vaporized produced very {sev 'light'} effects but made me leave with newfound meaning and motivation
~20mg vaporized produced feelings of shooting through space while completely clear in my head, very clean beautiful visuals
~25mg vaporized produced feelings of being torn out of my body and lost in space

TriedSubstances.Name: Oxitriptan
Effects: subjective improvement in wellbeing after {sub '3,4-methylenedioxymethampheamine' 'MDMA'} use

TriedSubstances.Name: Sumatriptan
Effects: intravenously warm uncomfortable panick inducing rush
burning sensation in my head immediately upon intravenous injection
relaxed cool and clear head feeling

TriedSubstances.Name: Lysergic acid diethylamide
TriedSubstances.Notes: made me more concious of how dissociation influences my perception of reality; broke communication down to a fluid simplified interface; vulnerable animalistic perception of organic living beings; enabled understanding repressed part of myself

TriedSubstances.Name: Lysergic acid fluorodiethylamide
Notes: "this was probably my best psychedelic experience so far"
"how can the breakdown of perception be this beautiful"
seams to loose potency in storage over the span of a couple of months

TriedSubstances.Name: Fexofenadine
TriedSubstances.Notes: no notable effect on allergic reaction

TriedSubstances.Name: Fluoxetine
Effects: {sev 'light'} {xeff 'depression reduction'} (acute effects; long term no notable improvement in quality of life)

TriedSubstances.Name: Estradiol undecylate
TriedSubstances.Notes: produces stable levels with no crashes when injected monthly

TriedSubstances.Name: Dutasteride

TriedSubstances.Name: Cyproterone acetate
